title: MetaCells System States
summary: Architecture view of workbook storage, dependency propagation, WebSocket transport, server compute, and managed jobs.

lanes.label: Client Workbook
lanes.description: UI, storage, and render loop in the browser.

lanes.label: Client Runtime
lanes.description: Dependency planning, local recompute, AI/runtime guards.

lanes.label: Server Compute
lanes.description: RPC, compute pipeline, job orchestration, publish.

nodes.title: Grid UI
nodes.summary: GridManager, formula bar, overlays, selection, report shell.
points: Reads active cell source and computed display
Shows status badges for pending, stale, error
Commits edits and triggers save or recompute

nodes.title: Workbook Storage
nodes.summary: SheetDocStorage + WorkbookStorageAdapter snapshot of tabs, cells, formats, runtime state, and named cells.
points: Persists source, value, displayValue, state, error
Keeps dependency graph and generated cell ownership
Flushes workbook snapshot through sheets.saveWorkbook

nodes.title: Cell Runtime State
nodes.summary: Per-cell lifecycle visible in the grid.
points: resolved for stable computed output
pending for async formulas, uploads, manual update placeholders
stale when downstream server recompute is still expected
error when formula or AI execution fails

nodes.title: Dependency Graph
nodes.summary: dependentsByCell, dependentsByNamedRef, scan fallback, transitive downstream traversal.
points: Maps source cell or named ref to downstream cells
Separates local sync targets from server-only async targets
Drives stale or pending propagation after edits

nodes.title: Local Compute Planner
nodes.summary: Collects immediate recompute plan in the browser and primes pending UI before server roundtrip.
points: Evaluates sync formulas locally when safe
Marks async targets pending and server targets stale
Rerenders changed cells without rebuilding the whole sheet

nodes.title: AI Runtime
nodes.summary: Tracks pending AI work, edit locks, generated result cells, and manual or auto mode.
points: Blocks duplicate async requests for the same source key
Uses edit locks while the source cell is being edited
Feeds generated result cleanup when source changes

nodes.title: WS Client
nodes.summary: Shared /ws socket with reconnect, heartbeat watchdog, workbook subscriptions, and server-event split.
points: Subscribes active workbook document IDs
Deduplicates workbook.event sequences per document
Separately dispatches workbook.event and server.event

nodes.title: Patch Application
nodes.summary: Applies cellPatchBySheet payloads and live server activity into client storage and UI.
points: Consumes workbook.runtime.updated and workbook.document.updated
Writes server patches into workbook storage
Refreshes indicators, formulas, reports, and overlays

nodes.title: RPC API
nodes.summary: sheets.saveWorkbook, server refresh, settings, jobs, and AI lock methods.
points: Receives committed workbook snapshots from the client
Starts compute and settings workflows
Acts as synchronous control plane beside WS

nodes.title: Server Compute Engine
nodes.summary: Formula evaluation, dependency collection, attachment handling, async scheduling, workbook event emission.
points: Classifies result into resolved, pending, or error
Builds cell patches and pendingCellIds for WS publish
Stores computed values back into workbook snapshots

nodes.title: Managed Jobs
nodes.summary: Live projection of low-level jobs into managed_jobs with workbook-cell ownership.
points: Tracks queued, leased, running, retrying activity
Maps queueMeta to sheetDocumentId, sheetId, and source cell
Publishes jobs.manager.updated as server.event

nodes.title: WS Server
nodes.summary: WebSocket fanout for workbook.event, server.event, ws.ready, and ws.heartbeat.
points: Filters workbook events by subscribed document
Broadcasts server events globally
Provides realtime path from compute and jobs back to the browser

items.name: source edited
items.detail: Raw source changes in the grid or formula bar and the storage snapshot is updated.

items.name: resolved
items.detail: Sync formulas and stable values render directly from computed state.

items.name: stale
items.detail: A dependent cell needs authoritative server recompute before the value is trusted.

items.name: pending
items.detail: Async formula, attachment conversion, or manual AI update is in flight.

items.name: error
items.detail: Formula, AI, attachment, or reference evaluation failed and the grid shows an error hint.

items.name: queued
items.detail: Job is registered and waiting for a worker.

items.name: leased or running
items.detail: Low-level worker owns the lock and is actively executing.

items.name: retrying
items.detail: A recoverable failure schedules another attempt.

items.name: completed
items.detail: Managed projection closes the live record and emits a final event.

items.name: connecting
items.detail: The browser opens /ws and waits for ws.ready.

items.name: connected
items.detail: Heartbeat is healthy and subscriptions are active.

items.name: reconnecting
items.detail: Watchdog or close event triggers resubscribe flow.

dependencyTree.title: Source cell
dependencyTree.detail: Cell source, attachment source, named-cell reference, or channel-driven formula becomes the origin.

dependencyTree.title: Collected dependencies
dependencyTree.detail: Formula engine extracts cell refs, named refs, channel labels, and attachment requirements.

dependencyTree.title: Indexed graph
dependencyTree.detail: Storage keeps dependentsByCell and dependentsByNamedRef, with scan fallback for unresolved formulas.

dependencyTree.title: Recompute plan
dependencyTree.detail: Runtime splits downstream nodes into local sync targets and server-only async targets.

dependencyTree.title: Propagation
dependencyTree.detail: Targets become resolved, stale, pending, or error, then patches flow through WS back into the grid.
